items.name: todoist-ai
items.description: A set of tools to connect to AI agents, to allow them to use Todoist on a user's behalf. Includes MCP support.

items.name: dingtalk-workspace-cli
items.description: DingTalk Workspace is an officially open-sourced cross-platform CLI tool from DingTalk. It unifies DingTalk’s full suite of product capabilities into a single package, is designed for both human users and AI agent scenarios.

items.name: AgentOfficeSuite
items.description: AOSE — An Office Suite Built for Agent Collaboration. Docs, tables, slides, flowcharts, canvas, and video — all editable by both humans and AI agents.

items.name: ruflo
items.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features    enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

items.name: clawdcursor
items.description: OS-agnostic, model-agnostic desktop automation server. Gives any AI agent eyes, hands, and ground-truth verification on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

items.name: mateclaw
items.description: 🤖 MateClaw — Your second brain with Multi-Agent Orchestration, MCP Protocol, Skills & Memory, Dream, and Multi-Channel Support. Built on Spring AI Alibaba.

items.name: TradingAgents
items.description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

items.name: gascity
items.description: Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

items.name: cli
items.description: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

items.name: sigcli
items.description: The authentication CLI & Proxy for AI agents. Give agents access, not your credentials.
